patient_summary: Patient Olivia, female, age 73. Primary documented diagnosis: Hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus (CMS/HCC). Major planned procedure: Ancillary Procedure at LGH KISSEL HILL on 08/18/2025. Active medication refill request for Atorvastatin (CVS). Recent notable labs: GLUCOSE 199 (H) on 01/11/2021; BMP abnormalities on 01/11/2021 including SODIUM 134 (L), CHLORIDE 97 (L), BUN 37 (H), CREATININE 1.1 (H), GFR 50 (A); Lipid panel on 07/17/2020 with HDL 38 (L), LDL 78. Functional limitations include difficulty walking, dressing/bathing, and doing errands alone (01/05/2021). Multiple care team members documented including PCP Hershey, Curtis L, MD and consultants in endocrinology, cardiology, oncology, and surgery. A conflict exists for date of birth documentation.
